$comment: Concept IDs are the platform's most load-bearing strings: they key profile facets, evidence rules, lesson declarations, and analytics. Registry-managed; never reuse an ID.

concepts.name: Reviewing diffs before accepting changes
concepts.explanationTemplate: Reviewed the agent's diff before touching any file in {n} lab session(s) ({dates}).

concepts.name: Using tests to confirm a fix (red → green)
concepts.explanationTemplate: Took a failing test suite to green in {n} lab session(s) ({dates}).

concepts.name: Inspecting AI-generated changes before accepting them
concepts.explanationTemplate: Completed the inspect→fix→verify checkpoint in {n} lab session(s) ({dates}).
